articles.title: Overwatch Overtakes Battlefield 6 and Call of Duty in Steam Player Surge
articles.excerpt: Overwatch has surpassed Battlefield 6 and Call of Duty in Steam concurrent players, reaching its biggest peak in years ahead of major updates.

articles.title: Hollow Knight Update Adds Ultrawide and Steam Deck Support for 9th Anniversary
articles.excerpt: Hollow Knight receives its first update since 2022, adding ultrawide and Steam Deck support alongside bug fixes just ahead of its 9th anniversary.

articles.title: Hytale Modders Create Mechs, Music Boxes, and MMO-Style Dungeons
articles.excerpt: Hytale modders are building mechs, programmable music boxes, and MMO-style dungeons, earning praise from Hypixel founder Simon Collins-Laflamme.

articles.title: Stronghold Crusader Definitive Edition Update Adds Steam Workshop and Co-op Campaign
articles.excerpt: Stronghold Crusader: Definitive Edition receives a major update with Steam Workshop support, 10 new maps, custom editors, and a 10-mission co-op campaign.

articles.title: Nintendo Direct Partner Showcase February 2026 – All Game Announcements

articles.title: Crimson Desert: Release Date, Gameplay, Platforms
articles.excerpt: Crimson Desert launches March 19, 2026. Here's everything we know about Pearl Abyss' ambitious open-world RPG so far.

articles.title: Blizzard Drops the "2" as Overwatch 2 Rebrands Back to Overwatch
articles.excerpt: Blizzard has officially dropped the "2" from Overwatch's title, signaling a long-term live-service future for the game.

articles.title: Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok Comes to Switch 2
articles.excerpt: Granblue Fantasy: Relink launches on Switch 2 July 9, 2026, with cross-play, Switch 2 local co-op, and multiple editions.

articles.title: Sony Patents a Buttonless Touchscreen PlayStation Controller
articles.excerpt: Sony's new controller patent describes adaptive touch surfaces and virtual buttons with optional screens.

articles.title: AMD Hints Next Xbox Console Could Launch in 2027
articles.excerpt: AMD CEO Lisa Su says development of Microsoft's next-gen Xbox is progressing to support a potential 2027 launch.

articles.title: Valve Discontinues Steam Deck LCD Model, Making OLED the Only Option
articles.excerpt: Valve has quietly ended production of the Steam Deck LCD model, leaving the OLED versions as the only choice.

articles.title: Nvidia DLSS 4.5 Announced With Image Quality Upgrades and 6x Frame Generation
articles.excerpt: Nvidia announces DLSS 4.5, improving image quality for all RTX GPUs and introducing 6x Multi Frame Generation.
